prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-VASELINE-LIPTHER-COBUT-3PK-HPN Product Type: LIP_BALM Brand (from catalog): Vaseline Existing Title: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter.25 oz (Pack of 3) Description: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter.25 oz (Pack of 3)

The Vaseline Cocoa Butter Lip Therapy Lip Balm helps you to avoid chapped lips so you can feel comfortable throughout the day. Put it on when it's cold outside or windy to protect your delicate skin from the elements.

It locks in moisture to prevent cracking.
You get .25 oz of Vaseline lip balm per jar.
Relieves dry and cracked lips, while locking in moisture to help them heal
Non-sticky, non-greasy formula, suitable for regular use.

Application is easy, just use your finger to rub it on and you're good to go.

How to use
Apply as needed to moisturize and soothe dry lips.

Ingredients:
Petrolatum, Flavor, Theobroma Cacao (cocoa) Seed Butter, Yellow 5 Lake. Search Terms: chap stick tubes for kids lip balm vaseline tube chapstick women men Features: - Helps to lock in moisture for beautiful, healthy lips - Gives lips a natural, glossy shine - Made from pure Vaseline Jelly - Choose from original, rose, cocoa butter, and crème brulee scented lip balm - Provides long-lasting moisturization and lip care === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter .25 oz Pack of 3

openai.item_name: Vaseline 3-pk .25 oz Cocoa Butter Lip Therapy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Locks In Moisture, Prevents Chapped Lips, Non-Sticky Formula, Long-Lasting Moisturization, Natural Glossy Shine

openai.title_differentiation: Locks In Moisture, Non-Sticky Non-Greasy Formula, Glossy Shine, Helps Relieve Dry Cracked Lips, Pure Vaseline Jelly
